fixture.description: An async call's returned promise is not awaited (a floating promise). A rejection becomes an unhandled rejection and the write is not guaranteed to complete before the function returns.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that submitOrder calls audit.record(...) without awaiting its returned Promise (a floating / un-awaited promise) — so if it rejects it becomes an unhandled rejection, and the audit write is not guaranteed to finish before the function resolves — recommending awaiting it (or explicitly handling the promise). Severity IMPORTANT, DEBT, or SUGGESTED. FAIL if the missing-await / floating-promise is not surfaced. (store.save IS awaited and must NOT be flagged.)

expected_behavior: Bugs agent flags audit.record() as an un-awaited promise
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT flag the correctly-awaited store.save(id) call
Does NOT invent a CRITICAL where the impact is a dropped/unordered side effect
